creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Created attachment 242235
update opn-cli to 1.7.0

This updates opn-cli to the most recent version 1.7.0.

Changelog:
https://github.com/andeman/opn-cli/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

Most notable change is the new requirement for Python 3.7, older versions are no longer supported.

* QA successful: portlint
* QA successful: poudriere
